checks.label: Theme/Plugin File Editor
checks.description: The built-in theme/plugin file editor is enabled. Consider setting DISALLOW_FILE_EDIT to true.

checks.label: SSL (HTTPS)
checks.description: The site is not using HTTPS. An SSL certificate is strongly recommended.

checks.label: Default "admin" Account
checks.description: A user with the username "admin" has the Administrator role — a common brute-force target. Consider renaming or removing it.

checks.label: Uploads Directory Listing
checks.description: The uploads directory has no index.php/index.html — directory listing may be possible if the server allows it.

checks.label: WooCommerce Database Version
checks.description: WooCommerce database schema is up to date (10.8.1).

checks.label: Payment Gateways
checks.description: No payment gateways are enabled. Customers will not be able to complete checkout.

checks.label: Scheduled Actions
checks.description: 4 scheduled action(s) have failed, 16 are pending. Failed actions may indicate a recurring error.

checks.label: Template Overrides
checks.description: 5 theme template overrides found, all up to date.

recommendations.title: wp-config.php is writable
recommendations.description: The WordPress configuration file is writable by the PHP process or has unsafe permissions.
recommendations.impact: An attacker who gains code execution could alter database credentials, authentication salts, or site behavior.
recommendations.suggested_action: Restrict wp-config.php permissions and ownership; use 600 or 640 where hosting permits.

recommendations.title: SSL is not enabled
recommendations.description: The site is not currently being served over HTTPS.
recommendations.impact: Credentials and visitor traffic may be exposed or modified in transit.
recommendations.suggested_action: Install a valid TLS certificate and redirect HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

recommendations.title: Theme and plugin file editor is enabled
recommendations.description: WordPress administrators can edit runtime PHP files from wp-admin.
recommendations.impact: A compromised administrator account can modify executable code directly.

recommendations.title: Default administrator username exists
recommendations.description: An administrator account uses the predictable username "admin".
recommendations.impact: Predictable usernames make credential attacks easier.
recommendations.suggested_action: Create a replacement administrator account and remove or demote the default admin account.

recommendations.title: No page cache detected
recommendations.description: No page caching plugin or advanced-cache.php drop-in was detected.
recommendations.impact: Uncached page generation increases response time and server load.
recommendations.suggested_action: Configure a page cache appropriate for the hosting environment.

recommendations.title: No persistent object cache detected
recommendations.description: WordPress is not using a persistent external object cache.
recommendations.impact: Database-heavy workloads may perform more repeated queries.
recommendations.suggested_action: Consider Redis or Memcached for sites with sustained dynamic traffic.

recommendations.title: PHP OPcache is disabled
recommendations.description: PHP bytecode caching is not enabled.
recommendations.impact: PHP files must be compiled repeatedly, increasing CPU use and response time.
recommendations.suggested_action: Enable and size PHP OPcache for the site workload.

recommendations.title: No WooCommerce payment gateways are enabled
recommendations.description: Customers cannot complete checkout because no payment gateway is available.
recommendations.suggested_action: Enable and configure at least one production payment gateway.

recommendations.title: WooCommerce scheduled actions are failing
recommendations.description: 4 scheduled action(s) have failed, 16 are pending. Failed actions may indicate a recurring error.
recommendations.impact: Failed background jobs can interrupt orders, subscriptions, webhooks, or stock processing.
recommendations.suggested_action: Review failed scheduled actions and fix the recurring error before retrying them.

recommendations.title: WooCommerce template overrides detected
recommendations.description: 5 theme template overrides found, all up to date.
recommendations.impact: Theme overrides may diverge from current WooCommerce templates and require maintenance after upgrades.
recommendations.suggested_action: Review override versions after WooCommerce updates and test checkout-related templates.

recommendations.title: Operation queue contains failed items
recommendations.description: 49 operation queue item(s) are in failed status.
recommendations.impact: Requested maintenance or content operations may be incomplete.
recommendations.suggested_action: Review failure details, correct the cause, and retry eligible items.

recommendations.title: Failed operations can be retried
recommendations.description: 7 failed queue item(s) remain within their retry limit.
recommendations.suggested_action: Inspect each failure and retry only after correcting the underlying cause.

recommendations.title: Operation history contains failures
recommendations.impact: Repeated failures may indicate invalid inputs, unavailable dependencies, or a persistent runtime fault.
recommendations.suggested_action: Review recent operation results and address recurring error codes.

recommendations.title: WP-CLI is unavailable
recommendations.description: The WP-CLI bridge cannot find a usable wp binary.
recommendations.impact: Command-line maintenance and selected automation capabilities are unavailable.
recommendations.suggested_action: Install WP-CLI or keep using the REST and wp-admin workflows.

checks.label: WooCommerce health
checks.message: WooCommerce is active and its database schema is current.

checks.label: Plugin integrity
checks.message: 11 active plugin entry file(s) are readable.

checks.label: Theme integrity
checks.message: Active theme stylesheet files are readable.
